news.headline: Two French alpinists break Mont Blanc speed climbing record
news.summary: A French duo has achieved a “mountainous” feat. They now have the new world record for making the fastest trek from the French ski resort city of Chamonix to the summit of Mont Blanc and back. They’re time: 4 hours, 41 minutes, and 24 seconds. That’s two minutes faster than the previous record.

news.headline: Vietnamese hiker survives 37-hour ordeal thanks to an unlikely Lunar New Year snack
news.summary:
A college student stranded in the mountains of Vietnam reportedly survived for 37 hours on just Orion Choco Pies. The South Korean snack, already beloved across Vietnam and often exchanged as a gift during the Lunar New Year, is now drawing attention as a survival essential in emergencies.

news.headline: King Charles expected to promote US-UK unity in speech before Congress
news.summary: King Charles III will speak before the US Congress on Tuesday, where he is expected to deliver an address promoting US-UK unity despite widening differences between London and Washington. Charles and Queen Camilla are on a so far studiously apolitical four-day tour of the US.

news.headline: Chinese man in his 40s wakes up 40 hours after having no heartbeat following cardiac arrest
